tagline: Your One-Stop Solution for Government Housing
centralized_allotment_desc: A single platform for all housing applications and allotments, ensuring transparency.
real_time_availability_desc: Check the availability of quarters and guest houses in real-time, with up-to-date information.
automated_notifications_desc: Receive timely notifications about your application status, waiting list, and allotment letters.
online_document_submission_desc: Securely upload and manage all necessary documents online, reducing paperwork.
registration_successful_verification_ema: Registration successful! A verification email has been sent. Please verify your email before logging in.
all_fields_except_official_email_require: All fields except Official Email are required
login_failed_use_correct_tab: Login failed. Please use the '{{expectedTab}}' tab to log in.
verify_email_before_login: Please verify your email before logging in.
help_support_intro: Find answers to your questions about government quarter allotments, guest house bookings, and other related services.
eligibility_criteria_desc: Allotment of government quarters is based on seniority, pay scale, and the type of quarter available. The eligibility criteria are determined by the specific department and location, following the guidelines set by the Central Public Works Department (CPWD).
allotment_process_desc: The process is initiated online through this portal. Applicants are required to fill out the prescribed form and submit the necessary documents. Allotment is done by a committee based on a waiting list, which is updated regularly. For detailed rules and procedures, please refer to the official allotment rules provided by your department.
booking_priority_desc: First priority is given to serving government officials on official duty, followed by retired officials, and then personal guests of serving officials. Bookings are subject to availability and confirmation by the guest house in-charge.
charges_payment_desc: Charges vary based on the room type and the category of the guest. Payment must be made in advance through the portal to confirm the booking. For a detailed tariff chart, please visit the guest house section on this portal.
faq_password_reset_q: How do I reset my password?
faq_password_reset_a: To reset your password, click on the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page and follow the instructions. An email will be sent to your registered email address with a reset link.
faq_multiple_quarters_q: Can I apply for multiple quarter types?
faq_multiple_quarters_a: Yes, you can specify your preference for multiple quarter types in your application. The allotment will be made based on your eligibility and the availability of the quarters.
further_assistance_desc: If you cannot find the answer to your question, please contact our support team at
or_call_us: or call us at our helpline number
